name: Cattle Dogs Golf Center
address: 1807 NE Diamond Lake Blvd, Roseburg, OR 97470
about: Cattle Dogs Golf Center is Roseburg, Oregon's first 24-hour indoor golf facility, offering a premier golfing experience with state-of-the-art simulators and over 220 courses available. The venue is designed to provide a welcoming environment for golfers to perfect their swing or enjoy a round of golf regardless of weather conditions, operating on a flexible model that supports both member access and walk-in play. Its social gathering atmosphere and event hosting capabilities make it a versatile spot for casual play, group outings, and corporate team-building events.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access for members allowing anytime play
Over 220 golf courses available on state-of-the-art simulators
Welcoming environment for all skill levels, especially beginners
Social atmosphere suitable for groups and events
Option to bring your own food and alcohol with corkage fees

food_and_drink.notes: Guests are welcome to bring their own food.
Alcohol can be purchased through the app or guests can bring their own for a small corkage fee.

faq.question: Do I need to have my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, you do not need your own clubs. The facility offers house golf clubs for rent, including adult sets in right and left-hand, and kids' sets in right-hand.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food. Alcohol is also allowed, but you can purchase it through the app or bring your own for a small corkage fee.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A full round of 18 holes typically takes between 45 to 60 minutes. A foursome may take up to 4 hours.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is kid-friendly. Minors are allowed with adult supervision required for those under 15.
